examples: The mullioned windows and the twinkling lattices are all ablaze with the red glory;
The new part, containing the schoolroom and dormitory, was lit by mullioned and latticed windows, which gave it a church-like aspect;
Some Windows are provided with decorative shutters. Other details include decorative wrought iron balustrades and the Windows are designed with traditional mullioned glazing.
College Inn , a survivor of the 1909 Alaska-Yukon-Pacific Exposition, has European-style rooms with mullioned windows and Liberty-style dressers.
